title: taraxacum engadinense
intro: Taraxacum engadinense, also known as the Engadin dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus. It is a close relative of the common dandelion and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Engadin dandelion is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and liver problems, due to its potential to stimulate digestion and detoxify the body. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum engadinense can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
